pitchEn: A 3-vs-3 turn-based team battle where your randomly assigned heroes fight across 10 levels. Land basic hits and discover each hero hidden 4-key special combo to turn the fight.
newFeaturesEn: First release of Battlefield HMM: 3-vs-3 turn-based team battles over 10 levels with hidden special-move combos and a local leaderboard in 15 languages.

dataHandling.notes: Fully offline standalone game. No accounts, no network. Only a self-entered nickname, score and language are stored on-device.

reviewerRemarksEn: Launch the app; on first run choose a language, then start the battle from the menu (Start / Space). Command your 3 heroes turn by turn: pick basic attacks or try key combinations to unlock each hero's hidden special. No account, login, or internet is required; it runs entirely offline and only asks for an optional leaderboard name.
